class-1.description: Zooplop is a physics-based puzzle game where you drop animals from a mechanical claw. When two animals of the same kind touch they merge into bigger ones!
class-1.metaDesc: Zooplop is a physics-based puzzle game where you drop animals from a mechanical claw. When two animals of the same kind touch they merge into bigger ones!
class-1.introText: Plan your moves carefully and avoid dropping too many animals at once, or you might run out of space. The game goes on forever or until all animals fill up the screen. Zooplop is easy to play but hard to master. How big can you go? Can you reach the whale? Can you merge the whale?
class-1.howToPlay: To move the animals, left-click and hold your mouse, then release it to drop them. Alternatively, you can use the A/D keys or the left and right arrow keys to move the animals, and the S key or the down arrow key to drop them!
class-1.aboutContent:
Who created Zooplop?
Zooplop is created by Venturous. Play their other game on Poki: Gobdun, Catpad, and Cubies!

How can I play Zooplop for free?
You can play Zooplop for free on Poki.

Can I play Zooplop on mobile devices and desktop?
Zooplop can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
